title: Latvian PM ready to sacrifice coalition for airBaltic
summary_full: "If the price of providing support to airBaltic is the collapse of the coalition, I am ready for that," Prime Minister Evika Siliņa (New Unity) stated on the social media platform "X" on April 15.
summary_public: "If the price of providing support to airBaltic is the collapse of the coalition, I am ready for that," Prime Minister Evika Siliņa (New Unity) stated on the social media platform "X" on April 15.

LV.label: neutral
LV.evidence: Latvian PM ready to sacrifice coalition for airBaltic
